name: Tunday Kababi
description: The most iconic eating joint in Lucknow known for its melt-in-the-mouth Galauti Kebabs. A must-visit for non-vegetarians looking for authentic Awadhi cuisine.

name: Royal Cafe
description: Originally a casual diner, famous across the country for inventing the majestic 'Basket Chaat'.

name: Sky Glass Brewing Co.
description: A stunning microbrewery offering craft beers and a highly electric atmosphere with panoramic views. Perfect for parties.

name: Prakash Ki Kulfi
description: Serving the best, creamiest Kulfi Falooda in the city for decades. Often crowded, but worth the wait.

name: Dastarkhwan
description: Renowned for its spicy, flavorful Awadhi gravies and incredible chicken masala.

name: Sharma Ji Ki Chai
description: The cult-classic tea stall of Lucknow where you will find everyone from students to politicians sipping tea gracefully.

name: Idris Ki Biryani
description: Some argue it's the best Mutton Biryani in Lucknow, cooked perfectly over slow heat.

name: The Cherry Tree Cafe
description: A very cute, aesthetically pleasing cafe with an impressive bakery and cozy interior. Ideal for dates.

name: Raheem's Kulcha Nihari
description: A breakfast staple for meat lovers. They've been serving authentic Nihari for generations.

name: Mubin's
description: Another powerhouse of old-city non-vegetarian Awadhi food.

name: Mocha
description: A premium café well-loved by the younger crowd for its spacious setting and fun environment.

name: Bikanervala
description: A pure vegetarian paradise with exhaustive choices ranging from street food to proper thalis.

name: Moti Mahal Delux
description: The legendary chain that claims to have invented Butter Chicken. Perfect for family dinners.

name: Free Spirit
description: A quirky themed cafe that resonates with college students for its decor and tasty snacks.

name: King of Chaat
description: As the name suggests, it is legendary for its hygiene and mouth-watering paani puri.

name: 1090 Food Street
description: An entire street dedicated to food stalls. Extremely popular among youths to hang out in the evening.

name: Netram Sweets
description: Known for the most traditional and satisfying vegetarian breakfast in Lucknow.

name: Falak Numa
description: A rooftop luxury dining experience overlooking the Gomti river, serving royal Awadhi delicacies.

name: Lalla Biryani
description: Rivals Idris when it comes to the title of 'Best Biryani in Lucknow'.

name: The Chocolate Room
description: If you have a massive sweet tooth, this cafe offers incredible chocolate-based desserts.

name: Aryan's Family Delight
description: A dependable chain for a solid, multi-cuisine family dinner.

name: Cafe Coffee Day
description: Good place for a coffee meeting or to do some remote work inside the mall.

name: Starbucks
description: International coffee chain with a fantastic ambiance located inside Lucknow's premier mall.

name: Chhappan Bhog
description: Lucknow's most premium sweet shop offering immaculate quality chaat and Indian sweets.

name: Oudhyana
description: The absolute pinnacle of luxury dining for Awadhi food. Five-star experience at the Taj.

name: Wat-a-Burger
description: Very budget-friendly burger joint, highly favored by students stepping out of campus.

name: Giani's Ice Cream
description: Great dessert spot to visit after dinner in Gomti Nagar.

name: Barbeque Nation
description: The go-to place for team dinners, parties, and anyone who wants to eat an unlimited amount of grilled food.

name: Keventers
description: Iconic thick milkshakes served in vintage glass bottles.

name: Domino's Pizza
description: Always a reliable option when you want pizza delivered quickly to your hostel.
